creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Update devel/py-envisage from 4.8.0 to 4.8.0.

Release notes: https://github.com/enthought/envisage/releases/tag/4.9.0

QA:
portlint : OK
port test : OK
poudriere : OK (py36, 12Ramd64)
make test : OK

make test in 'poudriere -i': fails with the following messages (seemingly related to bug 214340, an update of the mentioned ports did not help, yet).

qt.qpa.xcb: could not connect to display
qt.qpa.plugin: Could not load the Qt platform plugin "xcb" in "" even though it was found.
This application failed to start because no Qt platform plugin could be initialized. Reinstalling the application may fix this problem.

Available platform plugins are: bsdfb, minimal, offscreen, vnc, xcb.

*** Signal 6

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/py-envisage
